summary: Backend API testing completed for iteration 4. All 18 tests passed. New admin slot management feature verified: Admin (محمد الأنصاري) can add/delete slots for all teachers (البراء السيدا, عمر النجار). Non-admin teachers correctly blocked from managing other teachers' slots (403).
critical_code_review_comments: Admin slot management feature working correctly - POST /api/teacher/slots with teacher_id parameter
Admin can delete any teacher's slots - DELETE /api/teacher/slots/{id} works for admin
Non-admin teachers correctly get 403 when trying to add slots for other teachers
Non-admin teachers correctly get 403 when trying to delete other teachers' slots
Slot response correctly includes teacher_id, teacher_name, and created_by fields
MongoDB _id correctly excluded from slot response (no JSON serialization issues)
Error messages in Arabic ('فقط المشرف يمكنه إضافة مواعيد لمعلمين آخرين') are user-friendly
test_credentials: Test users created: admin (محمد الأنصاري with m0m0077100@gmail.com), teacher1 (البراء السيدا), teacher2 (عمر النجار), student
seed_data_creation: Test users and sessions created via mongosh, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin slot management feature fully tested and working. All 18 tests passed covering: admin adding slots for other teachers, admin deleting any teacher's slots, non-admin teachers blocked from managing others' slots, students blocked from slot management, edge cases (non-existent teacher, MongoDB _id exclusion). Frontend SlotsManager.jsx has teacher selector for admin which integrates with these backend APIs.
